name: 可持续建筑奖
home_text:
For 20 years, the Sustainability Awards have set the benchmark for excellence in Australia’s built environment — recognising projects, organisations and individuals delivering measurable, lasting sustainability impact. Long before sustainability became standard practice, the Awards championed leadership, innovation and credibility.

Now celebrating its 20th anniversary, we remain Australia’s longest-running and most respected program dedicated to sustainable building — trusted by industry and recognised by leaders shaping the future of the built environment.

Entries open 29 April 2026.

VIEW THE 2025 WINNERS

Partners

We’re partnering with like-minded brands who share our vision for change. Together we’re supporting the ongoing progress of the green building movement in our great nation.

Platinum Carbon Neutral Partner
Gold Partner
Category Partners
Strategic Partners
Media Partners
Partner with us
Our packages are meticulously crafted to position our Partners as the premier solution providers within their sponsored categories. This association aligns their brand with award-winning architectural projects and prominent professionals within the Architecture and Design network. Additionally, Partners receive exclusive access to valuable networking opportunities at the Sustainability Summit and Awards gala evening.

For more information about partner opportunities that may remain available in 2025, please contact Adrian at adrian.wilson@architectureanddesign.com.au or complete the contact enquiry form below.
